changelog: Added 9 new analysis profiles for different RE scenarios
Added model preferences per profile (exploit-dev, malware-analysis, etc.)
Improved token limiter with better UI controls and debug output
Fixed profile persistence in settings dialog
Enhanced mobile pentest profile with Dalvik/ART bytecode analysis
Added crypto-analysis profile with mathematical precision mode
Added deep-reverse profile for comprehensive analysis sessions
Added firmware-analysis profile for embedded systems
Added network-analysis profile for protocol reverse engineering
Added binary-patching profile for modification workflows
